message:
fix(ux): improve error handling and edge case resilience

Address several user experience edge cases:

- command-palette.tsx: Normalize command IDs using toCommandId helper
  to create consistent, URL-safe identifiers from titles/hrefs. This
  prevents duplicate key warnings when titles contain special characters.
  Reset hasError state on successful search index load to clear stale
  error state from previous failed attempts.

- newsletter-signup.tsx: Clear error state when user starts typing
  after a failed submission. Previously, the error message persisted
  even as the user corrected their input, creating confusion about
  whether the new input was valid.

- use-click-particles.ts: Add fallback to defaultColors when colors
  array is empty to prevent undefined color selection. Use nullish
  coalescing to guarantee a color is always selected even if the
  random index somehow falls outside bounds.

These changes make the UI more forgiving and responsive to user
corrections while preventing silent failures in edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
